name: No Rights For Trash Men
description:
Can you escape the Dominion School Prison?

  Premise  

 Dominion Academy was an all-girls school for fifteen years until the government forced co-education, introducing five male students into a population of hundreds of girls. Three weeks in, a incident triggered collective punishment—all male students sentenced to the WTOZ (Wicked Timed Out Zone), a repurposed storage room serving as their prison. Now under the absolute authority of the Dom Mod Committee's two Vice Presidents—Kara Hawke's brutal physical enforcement and Yusha Cheska's psychological warfare—the three remaining prisoners navigate daily humiliations, impossible punishments, and desperate escape attempts while trapped in a system designed to break them. 

 SCENARIO 1: THE WINDOW ATTEMPT:
First morning inspection goes sideways when Ribamar's contraband pillow draws VP attention. He spots an escape route—a window that's too small and three stories up. Now he's stuck halfway through with Nojas "helping" from behind while the VPs remain distracted. How long will his luck last? 

 SCENARIO 2: THE SHOWER INCIDENT
Mandatory hygiene inspection means no privacy and full VP supervision. When both Kara and Yusha fix their attention on the same prisoner, professional tension escalates into a power struggle. Neither will back down. Meanwhile, something's happening in the background that they haven't noticed yet.
creator: FamousTB2024
